name: workaholic
description: Standard Claude Code Configuration in qmu

plugins.name: workaholic
plugins.description: Structured development workflows and engineering standards in one plugin: ticket/drive/commit/report/ship commands, the /trip Agent Teams, hooks, and the 設計 / 実装 / 運用 policy skills (design, implementation, operation) mirrored from qmu.co.jp.

plugins.name: workflows
plugins.description: Portable cross-agent build of the ticket/drive/report/ship/catch workflow skills (self-contained, generated). For Codex, OpenCode, and other agents; Claude Code users install the workaholic plugin instead.
